name: uppromote
description: Reads affiliates, programs, coupons, referrals, and payments from the UpPromote API, and writes affiliate/referral/coupon/payment/webhook-subscription lifecycle mutations.

risk.read: external UpPromote API read of affiliate, program, coupon, referral, and payment data
risk.write: external mutation of UpPromote affiliates, referrals, coupons, payments, and webhook subscriptions; no destructive deletes are modeled
risk.approval: none required; every modeled write is a create/approve/assign/mark-paid style mutation, not a destructive delete
